turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi , anna , how is anna ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: anna is doing okay . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is doing well . uh , so the doctor knows the nurse told anna a little bit about dax . the doctor would like to tell dax a little bit about anna .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . so , uh , anna is a 26-year-old female with a past medical history , significant for epilepsy , depression , and , uh , peptic ulcer disease , who presents with , uh , some joint pain . so , anna , what's going on with anna's , uh , what's going on with anna's joints ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , um , anna's left elbow that's really been bothering anna . uh , anna sits at anna's desk a lot for work , and type , and anna stays in this motion specifically all day . and then after , um , work , it's really hard for anna to , uh , open and , and close anna's , my elbow here , anna's left elbow , and anna's left elbow has been just really stiff and , and hurts .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . has anna noticed any swelling there on the-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , anna has .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and is the swelling right here on the , on the tip ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep , the swelling is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and is anna right or left-handed ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: anna is right-handed .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so anna's left hand is anna's non-dominant hand ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , which is good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , anna can still write , which is great , but typing is , is difficult .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and any numbing or tingling in anna's hands at all ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , anna has n't felt numbing or tingling .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and any weakness in anna's arm ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: a little bit of weakness , uh , but nothing too significant .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and ... and how about .. and how about , um , any fever or chills ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no fever or chills .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , well , let's talk a little bit about anna's epilepsy , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , has anna had any recent seizures ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , no , anna has n't . anna thinks anna's last seizure was a year ago .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , good .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and is anna still taking the keppra ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , anna is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . and then , tell the doctor a little about anna's depression . how is anna doing with anna's depression ? the doctor knows that anna went into therapy last year , and anna tried to avoid medication since anna is already on the keppra . how is therapy doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , therapy , therapy's been good . therapy has definitely helped . uh , anna still feels a little down , uh , and , and stressed .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , but no , no feelings of anna wanting to hurt anna or somebody else ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , nothing like that .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and then , how is anna doing with anna's , with anna's ulcer ? the doctor knows that anna , anna know , anna had so much stress a year ago and , anna know , anna was having some issues there . the doctor did the endoscopy-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . and the endoscopy results showed that . so , how is anna doing with the ulcer ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: anna is doing , anna is doing better . anna has n't had any , um , issues with the ulcer , um , since the doctor did the procedure , and everything's been good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , well great . let's go ahead and ... the doctor is gon na go ahead with , um ... and , anna know , the doctor knows that the nurse did a review of systems sheet on anna when anna came in , and the doctor knows that anna was endorsing that left elbow pain .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: any other symptoms , anna know , chest pain , shortness of breath , abdominal pain , nausea or vomiting ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , nothing like that . anna has a little bit of nasal , nasal congestion from allergies , uh , but nasal congestion is it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so anna is endorsing some nasal congestion ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , well , let's go ahead to a physical exam , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the vital signs . good , here in the office , everything looks great with anna's vital signs . the doctor thinks that anna's vital signs look great , so the doctor is just gon na take a listen to anna's heart and anna's lungs , and take a look at anna's elbow and , and the doctor and anna will go from there , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , so , so on physical examination of anna's left elbow , anna does have some erythema and edema of anna's left elbow . does anna's left elbow hurt when the doctor touches anna's left elbow ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , anna's left elbow does .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , he ... anna has some pain to palpation of the olecranon . of the left olecra- olecranon , and the left olecranon is warm to palpation . um , can anna straighten anna's elbow for the doctor ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , anna's left elbow , it hurts , and anna's left elbow is , uh , it's a bit stiff .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so anna has pain with flexion and extension of the left elbow . there's a palpable right ... or s- ... palpable left radial pulse . okay , um , so let's go over ... the doctor just wan na take a look at some of anna's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the left elbow x-ray . hey , dragon , show the doctor the elbow x-ray . hey , dragon , show the doctor the left arm x-ray . okay , so , in reviewing the results of anna's left arm x-ray , there's no evidence of any elbow fracture , which is not surprising , okay ? hey , dragon , show the doctor the endoscopy results . hey , dragon , show the doctor the endoscopy . okay , well , anna's recent endoscopy showed that anna ... hey , dragon , show the doctor the endoscope . all right , so here it looks like , anna know ... anna's endoscopy results look like anna had an episode of gastritis . the episode of gastritis is for anna's , anna's peptic ulcer disease , and so everything , anna know ... anna took anna's , anna's protonix , and the doctor thinks everything resolved at that point , okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , let's talk a little bit about the doctor's assessment and the doctor's plan for anna . so for anna's first problem , this left elbow pain , anna know , the doctor thinks anna has olecranon bursitis , and the doctor is just gon na , anna know , have anna , anna know , get a little pillow for anna's elbow there . olecranon bursitis is just caused by repetitive trauma .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , maybe anna is slamming anna's elbow down a little bit on the desk , so just get a little rest there-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . and the doctor will give anna some melo- meloxicam , 15 mg , once a day . anna can ice the area , okay ? um , for anna's next problem , the epilepsy , sounds like anna is doing really well . the doctor would go ahead and continue with the keppra , 500 mg , twice a day . does anna need a refill of the keppra ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , anna does .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , order a refill of keppra , 500 mg , twice daily . for anna's third problem , the depression , it sounds like anna is doing well with the therapy and , if anna wants , the doctor and anna can talk about medical treatment options .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , anna thinks that would be great .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , well , let's go ahead and the doctor and anna will start anna on some lexapro , 10 mg , once a day , and the doctor and anna will see how anna does on lexapro , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , and then , for anna's last problem , the peptic ulcer disease , um , the doctor wants anna to continue on the protonix , 40 mg , once a day before meals , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does anna have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , anna do n't .

turns.speaker: D

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.text: all right , take care . bye .
